Defines custom exception classes for error handling in the Pebble Commander module.

# Purpose
This code defines a set of custom exception classes for error handling in a Python application. The base class `PebbleCommanderError` inherits from the built-in `Exception` class, and all other exception classes inherit from `PebbleCommanderError`. These exceptions include `ParameterError`, `PromptResponseError`, `ResponseParseError`, `RegionDoesNotExist`, `CommandTimedOut`, and `WriteError`. Each class represents a specific type of error that can occur within the application, allowing for more precise error management and debugging. This code provides narrow functionality focused on defining error types for a specific context, likely related to a command execution or interaction system.
